description_long: This handbag features a structured, semi-circular silhouette with a deep burgundy exterior and black handles. The front is adorned with a prominent round gold emblem featuring an intricate geometric design, adding a touch of luxury and distinction. The handles are short, sturdy, and attached with black leather accents, while gold hardware details are visible at the handle bases and zipper ends. The bag appears to have a zipper closure running along the top, ensuring secure storage for personal items. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting high-quality leather or faux leather construction. The overall design is elegant and suitable for both formal and casual urban settings.
description: A structured burgundy handbag with black handles, gold hardware, and a round gold emblem on the front. The bag has a smooth, slightly glossy finish and a secure zipper closure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the burgundy body, black handles, and a prominent round gold emblem centered on the front.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the bag's thickness, gold hardware at the handle base, and the zipper running along the top edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain burgundy back with black handle attachments and no emblem or decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the bag's profile, gold hardware, and zipper placement.
attribute_brand_logo: A round gold emblem with an intricate geometric pattern is centered on the front of the bag.
attribute_strap_type: Two short, fixed handles made of black leather, attached with gold hardware; no long or adjustable straps visible.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Zipper closure running along the top of the bag, with gold zipper pulls.
attribute_decorative_elements: Round gold emblem on the front; gold hardware at handle bases and zipper ends.
